name: unity-mvp-workflow-draft
purpose: Group repeatable Unity MVP development guidance into one future plugin boundary.

skills.name: unity-mvp-scope-review
skills.role: Review whether a requested change stays inside the current MVP scope.

mcp.name: unity-console-mcp-placeholder
mcp.role: Describe a future read-only Unity Console MCP server connection.

docs.role: Explain the bundle boundary and why it is not installable yet.

blockedUntil: The skill is reused successfully across multiple real MVP development tasks.
The MCP server is registered and validated through an actual Codex MCP config experiment.
The current Codex plugin manifest schema is verified with official tooling or documentation.
The package boundary proves useful across more than one Unity MVP project.
